title: Company Site
description: A static Nike-inspired landing page built with HTML and CSS to practice layout, navigation, and responsive design.
detailDescription: A front-end practice project that recreates the look and structure of a Nike storefront homepage. The page includes dual navigation bars, a hero banner, product grids with hover overlays, membership sections, and a multi-column footer — all built with semantic HTML and custom CSS, no frameworks or JavaScript.
features: Dual navigation header with brand logos and links
